title: 24pcs Glitter Eucalyptus Leaves Stems,13.8In Christmas Eucalyptus Branches Plants for Wedding Xmas Tree Holiday Winter Home Fireplace Decor (Red)
features: 【Package Include 】24pcs artificial red stem with eucalyptus leaves,which ideal for winter & christmas decor;
【Size】Each stem of eucalyptus leaves is about 35cm, with 24 leaves per stem.

【Flexible Material】The fake leaves of our artificial eucalyptus stems are made of high-quality plastic and iron wire. The branches can be twisted into any shape required and can be trimmed to any size with scissors or pliers. They are realistic and durable with frosted green color.

【 Easy to Care】They artificial plants Eucalyptus leaf spray does not require water, sunlight, and fertilizer. They are reusable and easy to clean dust, they will not fade and fall off and can be used directly in your DIY projects.

【Wildly Used】These artificial eucalyptus branches are lovely, elegant; They can help you break the monotonous environment. You can choose the eucalyptus stems bulk ​to mix with other artificial flower. They are great for wedding photo backdrop, wedding centerpieces, bridesmaids bouquets, farmhouse floral arrangements, baby shower, Halloween, Christmas centerpiece.

specifications_table.Specific Uses For Product: Home Decor, Hotel Decor, Office Decor, Outdoor Decor
